summary: Frontend-only UI verification of the redesigned MiniPay checkout mini-app (Intro -> Buy -> Review). Tested via Playwright at https://<preview-domain>/minipay/ with 420px mobile viewport. All 3 screens render correctly, match the reference design intent (dark onboarding, light dashboard-style buy form with hero card, Confirm Transaction review hero), and all major interaction flows work end-to-end with zero console errors.

ui_bugs.issue: Disabled 'MiniPay not detected' button uses --line (#e9eaec) background with --text-faint (#9aa1ab) text, giving a contrast ratio of ~2.3:1, below WCAG AA 4.5:1 for normal text. Confirmed it is GREY (not pink/salmon) so the original bug is fixed, but readability is still low.

action_items: Optional: darken disabled button text slightly (or lighten background less) to improve contrast on the 'MiniPay not detected' disabled CTA for accessibility, though this is a minor a11y nit, not a functional bug.
critical_code_review_comments: Buy.tsx is doing double duty as both Buy form and Review screen (mode state) - functional, but file is ~310 lines and mixes two screens' worth of JSX; could be split into Buy.tsx + Review.tsx if this file grows further, not urgent now.

No data-testid on individual package rows (PackageRow) - acceptable per test plan (text-content based selection works) but recommend adding data-testid=`pkg-row-${title}` in a future pass for more robust automated testing.
sessionStorage-based intro skip logic in App.tsx works correctly and was verified (session persists across route change).
verified_flows: Intro screen: dark bg, star illustration, title, 3 checklist rows with teal checkmarks, sticky white pill 'Get started' button visible without scrolling (confirmed bounding box within 900px viewport) - PASS
Get started -> Buy screen navigation - PASS
Buy header: circular brand icon + StarStore + 'Stars & Premium checkout' subtitle - PASS
MiniPay-not-detected notice card with working 'Get MiniPay' link (https://minipay.to, new tab) and Telegram fallback link (https://t.me/TgStarStore_bot) - PASS

Hero card (order-total-hero) with large $ amount, package label, Stars/Premium pill toggle - toggling instantly updates amount ($0.45 -> $16.99), package label, Next Steps sublabel, and package list (Star packs vs Premium durations) - PASS
Next steps card badge correctly updates from '1 of 3' to '2 of 3' as valid username (>=5 chars) is entered - PASS
Package rows clickable with coral highlight + filled checkmark on selection - PASS (visually verified in screenshot)
Token pills (cUSD/USDC/USDT) clickable with coral active state - PASS
Sticky bottom CTA 'Continue — $X.XX' remains visible/pinned after scrolling to bottom of form - PASS (bounding box confirmed post-scroll)
Continue without valid username shows inline error 'buy-form-error' and blocks navigation; valid username + Continue navigates to Review - PASS

Review screen: eyebrow 'CONFIRM TRANSACTION' (uppercase via CSS text-transform), centered icon badge (star/premium, color matches type), large $ amount + package label directly below, subtitle, detail card (Package/Recipient/Network/Network fee + bold total row), dark 'You're always in control' trust card with 3 green-check bullets, sticky bottom action area - PASS, matches reference layout well
Connect wallet button on Review: disabled=true, text='MiniPay not detected', background=rgb(233,234,236)=var(--line) grey (confirmed NOT pink/salmon) - PASS on the specific bug being verified
Edit order button navigates back to Buy form with username/package/token selections preserved (verified username value = 'testuser123' after edit-order click) - PASS
Zero console errors captured across full Intro -> Buy -> toggle -> package/token select -> error validation -> Review -> Edit order flow - PASS

success_rate.backend: N/A - not tested per request (frontend only)
success_rate.frontend: ~97% (1 minor a11y contrast nit on disabled button, no functional/visual bugs found)

test_credentials: Not applicable - no auth for this mini-app
context_for_next_testing_agent: This was a clean pass. The redesign matches the provided reference screenshot description well: dark intro with checklist + white pill CTA, light buy screen with prominent hero balance + icon toggle + package list, and Confirm Transaction review with icon+amount hero and orange-accent disabled/active CTA states. Only remaining nit is disabled button text contrast (~2.3:1) which is a minor a11y issue, not a functional blocker. Backend/on-chain payment (connectWallet/sendStablecoinPayment) was intentionally NOT tested since no real MiniPay wallet provider is injected in a standard browser and no backend server is configured in this session - this is expected per the review request and not a bug.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - no bugs found requiring RCA, only a minor contrast suggestion documented above.
